title: Workspace co-change links stay local git intelligence
summary: Kage workspace cross repo co change detection should uses repo-intelligence useful hidden coupling signal while staying Kage native: parse recent local git logs for sibling repos, match same author commits within a 24 hour wi
body:
Kage workspace cross-repo co-change detection should uses repo-intelligence useful hidden-coupling signal while staying Kage-native: parse recent local git logs for sibling repos, match same-author commits within a 24-hour window, cap large commits, restrict pairs to existing code graph files, and expose frequency/strength/evidence in JSON, CLI text, and viewer summaries without adding a hosted database or network calls.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp; node --check mcp/viewer/app.js; node --check docs/viewer/app.js; git diff --check; npm pack --dry-run
